name: Pumpkin Cake Cookies # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream sugar and margarine in an electric mixer on medium speed until light and fluffy.
2. Add pumpkin and egg; beat well.
3. Combine flour and the remaining ingredients (baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, allspice, salt, and nutmeg); add to creamed mixture, mixing well.
4. Drop heaping tablespoons of dough about 2 inches apart onto cookie sheets coated with cooking spray.
5. Flatten tops slightly.
6. Bake at 350°F for 18 minutes or until lightly browned.
7. Remove from pans; cool on wire racks.
8. Yield: 28 cookies (serving size: 2 cookies).
